name: Emova Group SA
summary: Emova Group SA operates as a retail flower distribution company. It operates a network of 29 own shops and 367 franchise stores under the Monceau Fleurs, Rapid 'Flore, Happy, and Au Nom de la Rose brands primarily in France. The company also offers indoor and outdoor decorative plants. The company was formerly known as Groupe Monceau Fleurs S.A. and changed its name to Emova Group SA in April 2015. The company was founded in 1965 and is based in Boulogne Billancourt, France. Emova Group SA is a subsidiary of Emova Holding.
